notes: quasar only defines CLI/Webhook/Chat enums in src/channels-security.ads; sibling channel registries are implemented in openclaw/src/channels/registry.ts, zeroclaw/src/channels/mod.rs, ironclaw/src/channels/mod.rs, nullclaw/src/channels/dispatch.zig, picoclaw/pkg/channels/manager.go, nanobot/nanobot/channels/manager.py

quasar has no provider factory yet; mature provider factories/routing exist in openclaw/src/agents/models-config.providers.ts, zeroclaw/src/providers/mod.rs, ironclaw/src/llm/provider.rs, nullclaw/src/providers/factory.zig, picoclaw/pkg/providers/factory.go, nanobot/nanobot/providers/litellm_provider.py

quasar denies empty allowlists in src/channels-security.adb and src/security-policy.adb; zeroclaw default SecurityPolicy is supervised with command/risk gates in src/security/policy.rs; picoclaw/pkg/channels/base.go and nanobot/nanobot/channels/base.py allow all when allowlists are empty

quasar defaults require pairing and disallow public bind (src/security-defaults.ads, src/gateway-auth.ads); openclaw defaults to token auth in src/gateway/auth.ts and persists pairing in src/pairing/pairing-store.ts; zeroclaw/src/security/pairing.rs, ironclaw/src/pairing/mod.rs plus src/channels/web/auth.rs, and nullclaw/src/security/pairing.zig implement hashed-token pairing guards

quasar has policy-level workspace and execution limits (src/security-policy.adb, src/runtime-executor.adb); strong sandbox/workspace controls exist in openclaw/src/agents/sandbox/validate-sandbox-security.ts, zeroclaw/src/tools/file_read.rs, ironclaw/src/sandbox/config.rs, and nullclaw/src/security/docker.zig

quasar policy supports private/local deny decisions in src/security-policy.adb; openclaw enforces SSRF and hostname guardrails in src/infra/net/ssrf.ts and src/infra/net/fetch-guard.ts; ironclaw documents allowlisted egress in src/NETWORK_SECURITY.md and enforces proxy allowlists in src/sandbox/config.rs

quasar secret policy requires encrypted-at-rest config in src/security-secrets.adb; strong at-rest encryption is implemented in zeroclaw/src/security/secrets.rs, ironclaw/src/secrets/crypto.rs, and nullclaw/src/security/secrets.zig; picoclaw auth store is file-permission hardened but plaintext JSON (pkg/auth/store.go); nanobot config keeps plaintext secret fields in nanobot/nanobot/config/schema.py

quasar persists redacted audit events with a local sqlite schema, retention governance, and query tooling in scripts/audit_event_log.py, and wires gateway startup/audit hooks in scripts/gateway_doctor.sh; openclaw audit findings and redaction live in src/security/audit.ts and src/logging/redact.ts; zeroclaw and nullclaw provide structured audit events in src/security/audit.rs and src/security/audit.zig
